_publications._publicationTitle: Structural and functional analyses of a germline KRAS T50I mutation provide insights into Raf activation.

_contextSnippet: studies in which we used CellTiter-Glo (CTG) to quantify metabolically active cells showed that K-Ras G12D,T50I conferred partial resistance to AC220, which was further augmented in cells expressing K-Ras G12D,T50I,E162L
details: K-Ras G12D,T50I conferred partial resistance to AC220, which was further augmented in cells expressing K-Ras G12D,T50I,E162L
